# infomaniak_public_cloud_user_authentication (Data Source)

Reads an authentication file (e.g. `clouds.yaml`) of a given type for a Public Cloud user.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "infomaniak_public_cloud_user_authentication" "clouds_yaml" {
  public_cloud_id         = 1234
  public_cloud_project_id = 5678
  public_cloud_user_id    = 42
  type                    = "clouds.yaml"
  region                  = "pub1"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `public_cloud_id` (Number) Identifier of the parent Public Cloud product.
- `public_cloud_project_id` (Number) Identifier of the parent project.
- `public_cloud_user_id` (Number) Identifier of the user.
- `type` (String) Authentication file type as understood by the Infomaniak API (e.g. `clouds.yaml`).

### Optional

- `region` (String) Target region (`pub1` or `pub2`).

### Read-Only

- `content` (String, Sensitive) Raw content of the authentication file.
